title: Kenya: Call for bids for the provision of water testing services
body: "On behalf of the Secretary of State for the Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office, the British High Commission (BHC) in Nairobi is seeking the services of a supplier that has the relevant professional skills, experience, technical resources and financial capability to provide water testing services at the British High Commission Nairobi.  Full details on the requirements, including instructions for interested bidders and registration are available via the FCDO’s e-Procurement portal, which requires registration. Registering is quick, easy, free and is the only way to review the tender documents.  Competent and financially stable suppliers are invited to access the invitation to tender documents by following these steps:   Open the https://fco.bravosolution.co.uk website, register and sign in Navigate to provision of water testing at the British High Commission Nairobi. CPG/12476/2025. ITT 7169, Project 12476   Contact the Regional Procurement Manager; Thabang.Mokoena@fcdo.gov.uk for any queries. Kindly note that the responses are required to be in English.   Deadlines  Please note that the invitation to tender documents should be completed and uploaded on the BRAVOSolution e-Procurement Portal by 15:00 EAT on 08 August 2025.   Disclaimer  The BHC reserves the right not to select any service provider and will only reply to the best-suited organisation.  The BHC will not meet any expenses incurred in preparing your invitation to tender documents. "
